---
name: "Add entry · 添加条目"
about: "Propose a new repo for the list (Agents · MCPs · Skills) · 提议新增条目"
title: "Add: <repo-name>"
labels: ["new-entry"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thanks for proposing an entry. Please fill out every field below.
For the quality bar and full submission rules, see CONTRIBUTING.md.
感谢提议。请填写以下字段。中文提交规则见 CONTRIBUTING.zh-CN.md。
-->

## 1. Repo URL · 仓库链接

<!-- The canonical primary URL (org/repo of record, not a fork). -->



## 2. Pillar + sub-category · 放在哪个分类

<!--
Pick from existing sub-categories in README.md.
Use the section label as in the README sub-section heading.
Example: `Agents → Multi-agent decision frameworks`
-->



## 3. Proposed entry bullet · 建议的条目

<!--
Match the existing entry rendering format:

- [<repo-name>](<repo-url>) - <≤120 en chars description>. *(Optional pairing / lineage note.)*

Same shape in Chinese (≤80 zh chars description). Do not include inline
activity dates, per-entry star counts, or bracketed curation badges.
Put dates and stars in §4 metadata instead.
-->

```markdown

```

## 4. Metadata at proposal time · 提交时的基本信息

- **GitHub stars**: <!-- e.g. 1.2k; repo entries normally need >=100 stars for the main list -->
- **Last commit or activity date**: <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->

## 5. Quality-bar self-evaluation · 条目自查

<!--
Six boxes. Tick what applies; if any is unchecked, justify in §7.
See CONTRIBUTING.md §2 / CONTRIBUTING.zh-CN.md §2 for full criteria.
-->

- [ ] **Open source** or has a public technical artifact (paper,
      architecture doc, reproducible demo).
- [ ] **Demonstrably LLM-driven** — LLM reasoning is a primary
      decision component (not feature extractor / post-hoc explainer).
- [ ] **Active in last 12 months** or canonical reference.
- [ ] **Clear scope + minimal documentation**.
- [ ] **Distinct contribution** — not duplicative of existing entries.
- [ ] **Public credibility signal** — normally >=100 GitHub stars
      for repo entries, or a documented maintainer-level exception.

## 6. Pairing annotation (optional) · 关联项目（可选）

<!--
If the entry pairs with an already-listed Skill / MCP / Agent,
declare it as `→ pairs with <name>` (entry uses the other) or
`← used by <name>` (entry is used by the other).
-->



## 7. Curation notes (optional) · 补充说明（可选）

<!--
Optional: explain if the project is official, why it is distinct from
nearby entries, or whether it has a cross-pillar relationship that
should be mentioned in prose.
-->



## 8. Anything else · 其他信息

<!-- Optional: novel aspect, distinguishing features, related entries. -->


By filing this issue you confirm that, if accepted, your contribution
to the list's text will be released under [CC0-1.0](../../LICENSE).
